subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath revealed wondrous and transcendent verses equivalent to all the Books of old, and likewise clear evidences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی معادل کتب قبل کلها ایات بدیعه منیعه نازل فرمود و همچنین بینات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
